meta.title: Refund Policy
meta.lead: This policy explains refunds, cancellations, and billing dispute handling for Nexografix services and platforms (including Arohio.ai).

blocks.text: This Refund Policy describes how refunds, cancellations, and billing disputes are handled for Nexografix (“we”, “our”, “us”) services and platforms, including Arohio.ai.

Refund eligibility depends on the type of service purchased (subscription, one-time service, milestone-based work, or enterprise agreement). Where a signed contract/SOW exists, that agreement governs.
A refund may be considered only if it meets the conditions below, subject to internal review:

items.label: Duplicate payment:
items.text: you were charged more than once for the same invoice/order.

items.label: Billing error:
items.text: incorrect plan/amount charged due to a verified system issue.

items.label: Non-delivery of paid access:
items.text: access was not provisioned despite successful payment and support was unable to resolve within a reasonable time.

blocks.text: Refund requests must be submitted with relevant proof (invoice/transaction ID) via the contact details mentioned below.
The following are generally non-refundable, unless required by applicable law or explicitly stated in a written agreement:

items.text: Completed consulting sessions, audits, or delivered reports
Milestones that have been delivered and approved (or deemed delivered as per SOW terms)
Work that has already started based on your approval/confirmation
Customization, integration, or enterprise onboarding efforts already executed
Usage-based fees consumed (API calls, processing, compute, storage, etc.)

blocks.text: For clarity: if a service has been delivered (in full or per milestone), refunds are not issued just because preferences changed or business priorities shifted.

If you are on a subscription plan, you may cancel at any time. Unless explicitly mentioned otherwise, cancellations stop future renewals but do not automatically trigger refunds for the current billing period.
If you believe you were charged incorrectly for a subscription renewal, contact us within 7 days of the charge for review.
For milestone-based or enterprise projects, payment terms and refund conditions are governed by the signed proposal/SOW/contract. Typically:

items.text: Advance/booking amounts are used to reserve delivery capacity and may be non-refundable
Delivered milestones are non-refundable once accepted or delivered per SOW definition
Change requests may affect scope, timelines, and costs and do not qualify as refund triggers

blocks.text: If a project is paused due to non-responsiveness or delayed approvals from the client side, it may not be eligible for refunds.

You may request cancellation of a service or engagement by contacting our support team. If cancellation occurs before work starts (and before capacity/resources are allocated), a refund may be considered after deducting processing charges (if any).
If work has already started, refunds are generally not available. In some cases, we may offer a partial credit (not cash refund) at our discretion.
To request a refund, email us with the subject line “Refund Request” and include:

items.text: Invoice / Order ID or transaction reference
Reason for request with relevant evidence (screenshots/logs)

blocks.text: We may request additional information to verify the request and prevent fraudulent claims.
If approved, refunds are typically processed within 5–10 business days. Actual credit time depends on your bank/payment provider.
We will confirm the refund decision by email. If a refund is rejected, we will provide a brief reason and (where appropriate) alternate resolution options.

In rare situations, we may offer credits or partial refunds as a goodwill resolution. This is not guaranteed and is evaluated case-by-case, considering service type, time invested, and the issue reported.
Refunds will not be issued for issues caused by third-party services, customer configuration errors, unsupported usage, or failure to follow documented instructions.
If you initiate a chargeback without contacting us first, it may result in account suspension and interruption of service access while the dispute is investigated.
We recommend contacting us before filing a chargeback so we can resolve billing issues quickly and fairly.
For refund-related queries, billing corrections, or disputes, contact Nexografix:
Please include your transaction reference for faster resolution.
